intro.title: Self-Care Tracker
intro.description: Track your daily self-care habits and see how they impact your overall wellbeing. Consistency is key to a healthier mind.

checkin.title: Self-Care Check-In 🌿
checkin.subtitle: How did you care for yourself today?
checkin.question: Did you practice self-care today? *
checkin.description: Self-care is any activity that we do deliberately in order to take care of our mental, emotional, and physical health.

activities.title: Your Activities 🎯
activities.subtitle: Which self-care activities did you do today?

duration.title: Time Spent ⏱️
duration.subtitle: How long did you spend on self-care? (optional)

noSelfCare.title: That's okay 💛
noSelfCare.subtitle: Let's understand what happened today.
noSelfCare.question2: What type of self-care would have helped? (optional)

review.title: Your Entry 📋
review.subtitle: Here's a summary of today's check-in

history.title: Weekly History 📅
history.subtitle: No entries in the last 7 days

positiveStatements.0: You showed up for yourself today. That's powerful. 🌿
positiveStatements.1: Self-care isn't selfish — it's essential. Well done. 💚
positiveStatements.2: Every small act of care builds a stronger you. 🌱
positiveStatements.3: You invested in yourself today. That matters. ✨
positiveStatements.4: Taking care of you is the best thing you did today. 🍃

supportiveStatements.0: It's okay. Tomorrow is a fresh start. Be gentle with yourself. 🤍
supportiveStatements.1: Not every day will be perfect, and that's perfectly fine. 🕊️
supportiveStatements.2: You're doing your best. That's always enough. 💛
supportiveStatements.3: Rest is also a form of self-care. Give yourself grace. 🌸
supportiveStatements.4: Acknowledging today takes courage. You're already growing. 🌷

app_description: Track your daily self-care habits and see how they impact your overall wellbeing. Consistency is key to a healthier mind.
your_progress_over_the_last_7_days: Your progress over the last 7 days
